name: closed-loop test reports a per-step status summary covering each pipeline phase
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=triage' out.txt && grep -q 'step=extract' out.txt && grep -q 'step=reconcile' out.txt && grep -q 'step=aggregate-evidence' out.txt && grep -q 'step=promote' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
